name: sql-backend-ucast-sql
description: SQL backend PoC using @ucast/sql. All 39 tests pass covering: operator translation (SQL-01), parameterized queries (SQL-02), ORDER BY (SQL-03), LIMIT/OFFSET (SQL-04), COUNT(*) (SQL-05), EXISTS (SQL-06), capabilities (SQL-08). Custom $contains interpreter compiles to LIKE with parameterized wildcards. Uses PostgreSQL dialect with $1, $2 placeholders.
relevantCode: SqlBackend class: compileSelect() uses @ucast/sql interpret() returning [sql, params] tuple. Custom contains SqlOperator uses query.where(field, 'LIKE', '%value%'). pgOptions includes joinRelation: () => false.
recommendation: ADOPT @ucast/sql for SQL backend. Pairs naturally with @ucast/mongo parser. Parameterized queries prevent SQL injection. Custom operators extend via SqlOperator interface. ORDER BY/LIMIT/OFFSET added manually (not part of @ucast/sql).
